title: Cellular Automata
description: Emergence from purely local rules, four classics in one: Conway's Game of Life (gliders and oscillators), Brian's Brain (restless travelling sparks), a cyclic CA that self-organizes into spiral galaxies, and a 1-D elementary automaton (rule 0–255) scrolling down. Pick the rule; cell size, step rate, cyclic state count, elementary rule number, and hue are live and audio-mappable. Click to reseed.
